name: Crab Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and add milk, Tabasco sauce, melted butter, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir in vinegar.
3. Peel and dice the carrot. Cook separately in a saucepan until tender. Allow to cool and stir into the egg mixture.
4. Add crabmeat and flour. Mix well.
5. Add chopped okra (cut into 1/2 inch pieces). Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
6. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
7. Shred cheese while the Crab Supreme is baking.
8. Spread shredded cheese on top after 10 minutes and return to oven for an additional 10 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
